ToolboxElements.Name: Starts With Text
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches if the input starts with the given text.

ToolboxElements.Name: Ends With Text
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches if the input ends with the given text.

ToolboxElements.Name: Contains Pattern
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches if the input contains the specified pattern anywhere.

ToolboxElements.Name: Does Not Contain Pattern
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches if the input does not contain the specified pattern.

ToolboxElements.Name: File Extension Match
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches if the input ends with the given file extension.

ToolboxElements.Name: Digits Only
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches if the input contains only digits.

ToolboxElements.Name: Extract Numbers
ToolboxElements.Description: Captures all sequences of digits inside the text.

ToolboxElements.Name: Positive Lookahead
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches if the input contains the given pattern (using lookahead).

ToolboxElements.Name: Negative Lookahead
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches if the input does not contain the given pattern (using lookahead).

ToolboxElements.Name: Positive Lookbehind
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches a pattern that is preceded by the given prefix (using lookbehind).

ToolboxElements.Name: Negative Lookbehind
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches a pattern that is not preceded by the given prefix (using negative lookbehind).

ToolboxElements.Name: Whitespace
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches any whitespace (spaces, tabs, line breaks).

ToolboxElements.Name: Non-Whitespace
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches any sequence of non-whitespace characters.

ToolboxElements.Name: Word Boundary
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches a word only if it stands alone (word boundaries).
